title: Better Villagers
description: Tired of villagers staring at walls or falling down in lava? Better Villagers is here which improves the overall mechanism of Villagers in Minecraft!!
body:
## Better Villagers

Better Villagers is a Fabric mod that changes how villagers choose where to walk by letting you assign custom path penalties to blocks.

A higher penalty makes villagers avoid that block more strongly. A lower penalty makes that block more attractive. The minimum penalty is `0`, which means villagers will prefer it over blocks with higher penalties.

This lets you guide villager movement in a simple and configurable way. For example, you can make villagers avoid dangerous or annoying terrain like lava, magma blocks, or water, while encouraging them to use paths and safer walkways.

## Features

- Custom villager block path penalties
- In-game configuration through Mod Menu
- Easy block-by-block control
- Supports multiple Minecraft versions on Fabric
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer

## How It Works

Each configured block gets a penalty value:

- `0` = most preferred
- Higher values = more strongly avoided

Villagers will try to path through lower-penalty blocks when possible.

## Configuration

You can configure the mod in Mod Menu.

Add entries in this format:

```text
minecraft:dirt_path=0
minecraft:grass_block=25
minecraft:magma_block=18
```

### More updates will come soon!!! have planned alot for my future updates

![this image is the config tab through which you can add or remove the penalties on different blocks for villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a832b5ccd459d18eff26ef05548222e51bce642_0.webp)
